LanguageData.TITAN_LatentDragonblood.label: Latent Dragonblood (Unstable)
LanguageData.TITAN_LatentDragonblood.description:
An ancient bloodline forcibly awakened flows through this creature's veins. This gene grants her near-immortal vitality, but at the cost of endless gene-rejection agony.
Effects:
- Extreme regeneration (x200%)
- Damage reduction (70%)
- Heightened immunity
- Side effect: chronic pain
